CREATE TABLE test_arrays (arr Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT arrayRotateRight(arr, 2) as res FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayRotateRight(arr, -1) as res FROM test_arrays WHERE arr IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arrayRotateRight(arr, length(arr)) as res FROM test_arrays WHERE arr IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arrayRotateRight(arr, 0) as res FROM test_arrays WHERE arr IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arrayRotateRight(arr, -length(arr)) as res FROM test_arrays WHERE arr IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arrayRotateRight(arrayRotateRight(arr, 1), -1) as res FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayRotateRight(arrayRotateRight(arr, 3), 2) as res FROM test_arrays;
WITH arrayRotateRight([1,2,3,4,5], 1) as rotated_arr SELECT sum(rotated_arr) as total FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayRotateRight((SELECT arrayJoin(arr) FROM test_arrays LIMIT 5), 3) as res;
WITH (SELECT count() FROM test_arrays) AS cnt, arrayRotateRight([1,2,3], cnt) as rotated_arr SELECT rotated_arr;
CREATE TABLE t2 (id Int32, arr Array(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT arrayRotateRight(arr, 1) as res FROM t2 WHERE arr IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, arrayRotateRight(arr, 2) as res FROM t2 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM t2 WHERE arr IS NOT NULL);
SELECT arrayRotateRight((SELECT arrayJoin(arr) FROM t2 WHERE arr IS NOT NULL), -2) as res;
